g.title: O365 - API Office 365.22323
g.desc: This package will provide stencils to visually represent Power Platform: Power Bi, Power Apps, Power Virtual Agents and/or Power Automate devices, architectures or solutions diagrams. It will provide stencils to visually represent features, systems, processes and architectures that use these technologies.
